chapter_title.ar: باب شُرْبِ الْمَاءِ مِنْ قِيَامٍ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي نَفَسٍ وَاحِدٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – Drinking the water whilst standing and drinking it in one breath

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/233)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/233)
text: أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَشْرَبُ الْمَاءَ وَ هُوَ قَائِمٌ ثُمَّ يَشْرَبُ مِنْ فَضْلِ وَضُوئِهِ قَائِماً ثُمَّ الْتَفَتَ إِلَى الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا بُنَيَّ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ جَدَّكَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) صَنَعَ هَكَذَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Ibn Al Azramy, from Hatim Bin Ismail Al Madainy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> drank the water and he<sup>asws</sup> was standing, then drank from the remainder of his<sup>asws</sup> ablution, standing. Then he<sup>asws</sup> turned towards Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to him<sup>asws</sup>: ‘O my<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup>! I<sup>asws</sup> saw your<sup>asws</sup> grandfather<sup>saww</sup> Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> doing like this’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from ibn al-‘Arzamiy from Hatim ibn ’Isma‘il al-Madiniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin once drank water standing. He then drank the water left from his wudu standing; then he turned to Al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and said, ‘Son, I saw your grandfather, the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, doing as I just did.’”
